infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allway Driver needs your location to match you with nearby trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allway Driver tracks your location in the background so dispatchers can see your position when you are online.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allway Driver tracks your location in the background while you are on shift.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to upload your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record voice messages when reporting an incident to the operations team.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select a profile photo from your photo library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Allway Driver to use your location to match you with trips and share your position with dispatch.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Allway Driver to use your location in the background while you are on shift.
